body.title: Remove wild_igor/ from TheIgors; make it a docs archive
body.result: Archived TheIgors: deleted wild_igor/, updated all imports, added ARCHIVE.md, updated README.md, committed and pushed.
body.description:
After T-igor-import-rewrite is confirmed working: delete wild_igor/ from TheIgors repo. Add an ARCHIVE.md at the TheIgors root explaining it is now a docs/skills/slates archive — all runnable Igor code lives in devices/igor/ in UnseenUniversity. Update any remaining lab/ scripts in TheIgors that reference wild_igor paths. Commit and push.

**Affected files:** ~/TheIgors/wild_igor/ (deleted), ~/TheIgors/ARCHIVE.md (new), ~/TheIgors/README.md (updated), any lab/ scripts referencing wild_igor paths
**Design rules:** TheIgors becomes non-runnable after this step — verify nothing in TheIgors/lab/ imports from wild_igor before deleting
**Scope boundary:** In scope: delete wild_igor/, add archive docs, update scripts. Out of scope: deleting TheIgors repo (kept for history, skills, slates). Out of scope: moving CC skills from TheIgors (separate decision).
**Test plan:** `ls ~/TheIgors/wild_igor/` fails with 'No such file or directory'. `grep -rn 'from wild_igor\|import wild_igor' ~/TheIgors/lab/ --include='*.py'` returns zero results. Igor still running from devices/igor/ location. `pytest tests/ -x -q` from UnseenUniversity still passes.
